payload.description: act log currently dumps the full op stream with no filter flags. Retrospectives (like the aac-website dogfood debrief) want to filter by time, by issue, or by op type. Today the op log is a haystack at retrospective time. Source: docs/aac-website-dogfood-debrief.md §7.
payload.title: cli: act log needs --since, --by-issue, --type filters for retrospectives
